description: Seller dashboard overview, product catalog, orders, messages, wallet, profile settings, and notifications

seller-dashboard.description: Dashboard overview with KPIs, revenue chart, best sellers, and recent transactions

seller-products.description: My Products tabs (all/active/low stock/out of stock), add/edit/view product modals

seller-orders.description: Order management table with status filters and stats

seller-wallet.description: Wallets & earnings overview, edit payment details, withdraw funds

seller-profile.description: Profile settings tabs: business, security, bank, notifications, reviews, top farmers
